content.query:
SELECT          OC.CUNO AS [Customer ID]
,               OC.CUNM as [Customer Name]
,               ODH.ORNO as [Sales Order]
,               ODH.DLIX as [Delivery Number]
,               ODL.PONR as [Line Number]
,               ODL.POSX as [Line Number - Sub]
,               MM.ITNO as [Item Number]
,               MM.ITDS as [Item Description]
,               ODL.IVQT as [Invoice Qty]
,               ODL.NEPR as [Net Price]
,               OH.UCA9 as [Carrier Type]
,               DLRM as [Carrier SCAC]
,               ETRN as [Tracking/Pro Number]
,               ODH.IVDT as [Invoice Date]
FROM            M3.ODHEAD ODH
JOIN            M3.ODLINE ODL ON ODH.ORNO = ODL.ORNO AND ODH.DLIX = ODL.DLIX
JOIN            M3.OOHEAD OH on ODH.ORNO = OH.ORNO
JOIN            M3.OCUSMA OC ON ODH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN            M3.MITMAS MM ON ODL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN       M3.MPTRNS MP on ODH.DLIX = MP.DLIX
WHERE           DLDT >= GETDATE() - 14
